TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciwcia ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 443 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 130 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 313 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 14%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 9%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciwcia hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Ciwcia hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ciwcia ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ciwcia ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuruŋan. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa parupu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciwcia ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 443 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 130 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 313 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 14%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 9%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciwcia hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Ciwcia hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ciwcia ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ciwcia ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuruŋan. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ħjaʔ ɣa parupu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
